title: Rust/Zephyr: Missing DTN store-and-forward (spec 9.8)
description: Python Router has DTN buffer management (dtn_buffer_message, dtn_retrieve_for, dtn_expire_old) with byte-level accounting. Neither Rust nor Zephyr implement DTN. Reference: python/src/lichen/routing/router.py DtnMessage class
close_reason: Implemented DTN store-and-forward (spec 9.8) for Rust (DtnBuffer in lichen-node/src/routing.rs with 7 tests) and Zephyr C (lichen/subsys/lichen/routing/dtn.c with header). Features: buffer_message with expiry check, oldest-first eviction, get_pending_iids, retrieve_for, expire_old. Configurable via Kconfig (LICHEN_DTN).
